pages_detail.ocr_text:
This document is related to the completion of a solar power system installation project. It is dated July 2023 (Heisei 5 in the Japanese era). The document contains a verification section, indicating it has been reviewed, handled, and created by responsible parties. There are placeholders for three signatories presumably for approval and oversight purposes.
